remarks: Cute ranch located close to Compo Beach in Westport. Property features a beautiful private yard an acre and includes your own pond! Property has Belgian block walkway lined with lush landscaping leading you to the front door. Open floorplan with living area with fireplace and kitchen. Main level also features all 3 bedrooms. Good size deck off the kitchen looking out to the grounds and the pond. Basement features an additional finished room with sliders to rear yard, 2 car garage and laundry area. Owner/agent.
